sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91032" key="prwto/posis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτό-ποσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n91032.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a woman who still has her first husband</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1713.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Themiso Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
